description: This pipeline processes image data by first applying a series of filtering operations, including cropping and smoothing, to enhance the quality and focus of the input images. The processed images are then used as inputs for further analysis, involving line detection and mathematical operations, to extract specific features and information from the data. Additionally, the pipeline includes steps to adjust the contrast and normalize the image histograms, ultimately producing an output that highlights key aspects of the original images.

003b5b50-7061-47b7-b95a-e43c2d0f031b.name: annotate-split-by-annotation
003b5b50-7061-47b7-b95a-e43c2d0f031b.description: Splits the input data by a specified annotation or filters data based on the annotation value.

85164b0e-b1e8-40cf-8c85-314953299a69.name: ij1-segment-ridge-detector-2d
85164b0e-b1e8-40cf-8c85-314953299a69.description: A ridge detector that detects lines and outputs a binary mask where lines are detected.

7ef3e065-ec48-478f-a040-9cfba6d80d70.name: ij1-math-imagecalculator2d
7ef3e065-ec48-478f-a040-9cfba6d80d70.description:
Applies a mathematical operation between two images. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice. Old implementation that directly uses the one provided by ImageJ. We recommend to use 'Fast image arithmetics' instead.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

f71a17fc-003a-4db2-aee3-76b5c5650fc6.name: ij1-transform-crop2d
f71a17fc-003a-4db2-aee3-76b5c5650fc6.description: Crops a 2D image. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

5a9ae1db-ba62-41d9-a6e5-ca21b1a6e78b.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
5a9ae1db-ba62-41d9-a6e5-ca21b1a6e78b.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

e7515ff3-1f38-4a25-9d50-89f7d3b35d19.name: ij1-contrast-histogram-enhancer
e7515ff3-1f38-4a25-9d50-89f7d3b35d19.description: Implementation of the ImageJ contrast enhancer feature that uses histograms and normalization methods.
